/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SystemUpdaterPluginplugin.dir/link.d  -o Custom/SystemUpdater/libSystemUpdaterPluginplugin.so CMakeFiles/SystemUpdaterPluginplugin.dir/SystemUpdaterPluginplugin_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SystemUpdaterPluginplugin.dir/SystemUpdaterPluginplugin_Custom_SystemUpdaterPlugin.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/var/home/user/.config/quickshell/updater-plugin/build libSystemUpdaterPlugin.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
